chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1587 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.05.2022 Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, Assistant A.G. ----- This petition was filed originally on 13th April 2022 on the count that the petitioners have solemnized marriage on account of their freewill. However, an FIR was lodged, quashment of which was sought in this petition. It appears that the petitioners after exhausting the remedy by moving this petition and an interim relief lost interest in the proceedings. There is also no report either from the concerned court as to the disposal of the case in a routine manner since notices have been issued to them on the earlier date of hearing. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE
